name: Potato-Vegetable Latkes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and carrots.
2. Put the potatoes in cold water.
3. Grate the zucchini, potatoes, onions, and carrots using a food processor or by hand with an aluminum grater.
4. In a bowl, mix together the grated vegetables, beaten eggs, salt, and pepper.
5. Stir in the matzo meal.
6. Shape the batter into pancakes, using 1-2 tablespoons of mixture for each.
7. Fry latkes, a few at a time, in 1-2 tablespoons hot oil for 1 1/2 minutes per side.
8. Add additional oil as necessary.
9. Drain on paper towels.
10. Serve with hot apple sauce.
Nutritional info per latke without oil: 47 calories; 2g protein, 8g carbohydrates, 1g fat (14%), 1g fiber, 27mg cholesterol, 56mg sodium
Source: Miami Herald, 12/14/95
